economic_notes: Xaxli'p Development Corporation accounted for by modified equity method. Fountain Ranch Ltd. fully consolidated. Advances to Xaxli'p business entity of $771,965 during the year. Portfolio investments of $1,411,267 acquired during the year.
notes: Financial statements are restated (Note 14) with a correction of error of $177,717 added to opening accumulated surplus. Auditor location is Kamloops BC, report dated July 13, 2021 — over a year after fiscal year end. Auditor firm name not explicitly stated, only 'Chartered Professional Accountants'. Xaxli'p Development Corporation excluded from consolidation and accounted for by modified equity method (GBE). Fountain Ranch Ltd. is fully consolidated. Bank indebtedness of $290,000 offsets cash. Long-term debt balance not explicitly stated on face of statements in the provided text. Infrastructure expenses include Public Works ($355,659), Forestry ($392,225), and Ministry of Transportation Slide Stabilization ($387,095) combined as $742,754. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + CMHC + FNHA + Province of BC + FNESC + ASETS + Work Opportunity Program + Gaming revenue + St'at'imc Trust = 2,909,174 + 92,647 + 969,379 + 1,221,072 + 66,355 + 48,083 + 47,159 + 494,350 + 224,302 = 6,072,521; OSR = 8,149,403 - 6,072,521 = 2,076,882 but classification is uncertain. OSR recalculated as other revenue + rental income + interest income + allocation to replacement reserve = 1,733,308 + 253,361 + 61,345 + 28,868 = 2,076,882.
